# daytona_update_sandbox_state (Action)

Updates a Daytona sandbox state directly. This action is intended for runner/control-plane integrations; prefer the start, stop, archive, and recover actions for normal lifecycle operations.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `state` (String) New Daytona sandbox state. Supported values are: creating, restoring, destroyed, destroying, started, stopped, starting, stopping, error, build_failed, pending_build, building_snapshot, unknown, pulling_snapshot, archived, archiving, resizing, snapshotting, forking.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `error_reason` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Optional error reason to attach when setting an error state.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID` for this action. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
- `recoverable` (Boolean) Whether Daytona should mark the sandbox state as recoverable.
